basic_details.job_title: DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office (DMHO) has published the Medical Officer Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Medical Officer position on a contract basis. Candidates aged between 18 and 44 years and holding an MBBS degree registered with the Telangana Medical Council are eligible to apply through the prescribed offline mode on or before 17 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years + length of service; NCC Instructor: 3 years + length of service; Physically challenged: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS registered with TG Medical Council
qualification.details: MBBS registered with TG Medical Council

selection_process: Merit list based on qualifying examination marks (90 marks) and age weightage (10 marks) Display of merit list on official website Preparation of selection list following Rule of Reservation (RoR) and Presidential Orders
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree and be registered with the Telangana Medical Council to be eligible for the Medical Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates is between 18 years and 44 years. Specific age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Medical Officer position announced in this recruitment drive by DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Medical Officer post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 52,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a merit list prepared from qualifying examination marks (90 marks) and age weightage (10 marks), followed by the display of the merit list and preparation of the selection list.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal Medical Officer recruitment must be submitted in offline mode, likely through post, as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DMHO Jogulamba Gadwal, which is https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in.
